description_long: This is a modern filing cabinet with a rectangular shape, featuring a faux marble top surface and a body finished in smooth, light gray material. The front side displays four evenly spaced drawers, each equipped with a horizontal metallic handle, providing easy access to the storage compartments. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or features, and the cabinet stands on four short, round feet, likely made of plastic or metal. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments. The handles are dark gray, contrasting with the lighter body, and the top surface mimics the appearance of polished stone. The cabinet appears sturdy and is likely constructed from engineered wood or metal with a laminate finish.
description: A modern, light gray filing cabinet with four drawers, metallic handles, and a faux marble top. It stands on four short round feet and has a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: The front view shows four drawers with horizontal metallic handles and a faux marble top.
description_view_1: The left side view is plain, showing the smooth side panel and two of the round feet beneath.
description_view_2: The back view is featureless, displaying a flat panel and the tops of the four feet.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a plain panel and two visible round feet.
